title: Cryo-EM sample preparation for RCKW:DARPin complex

steps: Plasma clean grids. We used UltrAuFoil Holey Gold 1.2/1.3 300 mesh grids and plasma cleaned them in the Solarus II (Gatan) using the QuantiFoil Au preset.
Apply protein to grids and plunge freeze (3-4 uL) We used a Vitrobot (FEI) to blot away excess sample and plunge freeze
Store grids in liquid nitrogen until ready for imaging.

Dilute samples to desired concentration in the LRRK2 buffer . Make sure final salt is at 150 mM NaCl. For best results, make 8 µL samples, good for freezing 2 grids. This is to minimize time spent outside of storage buffer, reducing aggregation.
creator: Marta Sanz Murillo
